artefacts.expected: GENERATED in Week 1 from inputs, then frozen

subject: Mathematics
structure: 100 marks, 7 sections: Whole Numbers; Addition & Patterns; Multiplication & Division; Fractions; Measurement; Geometry; Data Handling. Non-calculator, working space inline.

baseline.variant_A_note: ESTIMATE — crossed-out work, ambiguous digits, sections F & G not attempted (no Geometry/Data baseline)
baseline.variant_B_note: Variant B built with deliberate retargets (Q4 inverse ops, Q10 pattern table, Q15 step lines, Q19c mixed numbers, Q20b fraction-of-amount, Q23 conversions); completed score not recorded in project history

known_gaps.description: Systematic decimal placement errors across ALL measurement conversion types

Five sub-gaps: numerator/denominator written upside-down; wrong comparison method (rule: 'make the bottoms match'); improper fractions not converted to mixed numbers; fraction-of-amount using only the denominator step
Duration calculated by subtraction instead of counting forward
Multi-step word problems abandoned after one step
Crosses out CORRECT answers and replaces with wrong ones
Sections F (Geometry) and G (Data Handling) blank in Variant A

tolerance.note: Loosest tolerance — historical total was itself an estimate
